mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.rating, r.content, r.user_id AS userId, r.created_at AS createdAt, p.name AS petName, p.image_url AS profileImageUrl, opt.option_name AS optionName FROM petlog.review r JOIN petlog.users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN petlog.pets p ON u.id = p.user_id AND p.is_primary = true LEFT JOIN petlog.order_item oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.id LEFT JOIN petlog.`option` opt ON oi.option_id = opt.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId}
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC ORDER BY r.rating ASC, r.created_at DESC ORDER BY r.rating DESC, r.created_at DESC
SELECT image_url FROM `petlog`.review_image WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM petlog.review WHERE product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO petlog.review (user_id, product_id, order_item_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderItemId}, #{rating}, #{content})
INSERT INTO petlog.review_image (review_id, image_url, sort_order) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM petlog.review_image WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND image_url = #{imageUrl}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.product_id, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at, p.name AS productName, pi.image_url AS productImageUrl FROM `petlog`.review r JOIN `petlog`.product p ON r.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `petlog`.product_image pi ON pi.product_id = p.id AND pi.is_thumbnail = true WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
